headline: Lux Radio begins as a signal room.
summary: A preview rotation for release energy, visual-world notes, listening-room atmosphere, and future member programming.
notice: Public radio is preview-only until the first approved programming window opens.

listenerPath.label: Tune

readiness.label: Preview source
readiness.detail: The public preview loop is attached to the media player and live media-source QA.

readiness.label: Playback reporting
readiness.detail: Tune-in, playback, fan reaction, and radio programming clicks report through protected operator summaries.

readiness.label: Full programming
readiness.detail: Member episodes, live rooms, and guest programming open only after approval.

publicRules: Do not publish exact private room details before approval.
Do not imply a continuous live broadcast until the first programming window is approved.
Route fan interest through first-access capture.

slots.label: Now

slots.label: Next
